instructions: Exclude children's and family-only events. Include events suitable for general adult audiences.

searches.query: classical music symphony orchestra ballet opera this weekend NYC
searches.label: Music & Dance
instructions: Exclude flamenco, contemporary dance, folk, and world music unless they have strong classical elements.

searches.query: NYC parks outdoor events this weekend
searches.label: Parks & Outdoors
instructions: Prioritize organized and programmed events over standing daily amenities.
Do not list open-access facilities (ice rinks, fishing areas, playgrounds) or recurring tours that operate every day without a specific organized gathering.

searches.query: street festivals outdoor markets fairs events this weekend NYC
searches.label: Festivals & Markets

searches.query: art museums galleries library cultural events this weekend NYC
searches.label: Arts & Culture
instructions: Cover a range of institutions — do not list more than 5 events from any single institution.
Include both museum/gallery events (openings, tours, public programs) and library events (readings, talks, film screenings).
Prioritize opening receptions, curator tours, author talks, and ticketed events over general museum hours.

searches.query: MTA NYC subway bus service changes advisories this weekend
searches.label: Transit
